title: Inception
description: A skilled thief enters layered dream worlds to plant an idea deep inside a target's subconscious.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole to search for a new home for humanity.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who pushes Gotham City into chaos.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two imprisoned men build a lasting friendship while hoping for freedom and redemption.

title: The Godfather
description: The aging head of a crime family transfers control of his empire to his reluctant son.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The Avengers assemble one final time to undo the devastation caused by Thanos.

title: Titanic
description: A love story unfolds aboard the ill-fated RMS Titanic on its maiden voyage.

title: La La Land
description: An aspiring actress and a jazz musician chase dreams while navigating love in Los Angeles.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family gradually infiltrates a wealthy household, leading to unexpected consequences.

title: Joker
description: A struggling comedian spirals into madness and becomes a symbol of social unrest.

title: 3 Idiots
description: Three engineering students challenge the education system while discovering friendship and purpose.

title: Dangal
description: A former wrestler trains his daughters to become world-class champions.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
description: Three friends reconnect on a life-changing road trip across Spain.

title: Your Name
description: Two teenagers mysteriously begin swapping bodies and become deeply connected.

title: Spirited Away
description: A young girl enters a magical world and must rescue her parents from a curse.

title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against intelligent machines.

title: The Social Network
description: The rise of Facebook brings ambition, legal battles, and fractured friendships.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A kind-hearted man unexpectedly finds himself present at many pivotal moments in history.

title: Whiplash
description: A young drummer endures relentless pressure from an intimidating music instructor.

title: Blade Runner 2049
description: A replicant hunter uncovers a secret that could transform society forever.
